十万年后，武道修行，血脉为王。废血为虫，不得修炼，神血为龙，翱翔九天。

给作者提一个高要求：希望随着主角进入神境，小说里面的神者世界慢慢能够摆脱弱肉强食的丛林法则。加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1712321037,"group_id":"7143134984532921382","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N729H8PISp4uvtGkz9rg1J4=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"22281525591","user_name":"秦慕彦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"22281525591","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7143134984532921382","book_info":{"abstract":"【无敌、热血、快节奏、爆更、亿万读者强推！】十万年前，人人如龙，皆可修炼武道，劫变之后，天道崩塌，诸神陨落，只有一尊轮回古塔遗留世间。
十万年后，武道修行，血脉为王。废血为虫，不得修炼，神血为龙，翱翔九天。
一个废品血脉的少年，偶得无名宝塔，穿越到这个玄幻异世界，以废品血脉踏上了葬天之途。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9ff18566613219ab93449964e5f45c67","author":"爱哭的小十七","author_id":"","book_id":"7143134984532921382","book_name":"葬天境","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b0c0c8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"31万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7143135218344722958","read_count":"310001","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"8538726"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"4033","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,穿越,空间,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d3d5436c9cd6c4dedd448c82ed08dfa0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779164944&x-signature=%2Fk0KX1ayJmQQUHpuKC9fu8dMQ3A%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2414952757335879","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4118"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读280小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":634478,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1009453,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":29449},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7297535240989721385","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"连续看了几个月，终于赶到催更了，情节一波三折，很吸引人。优点如下：
主角不服输，不认命，迎难而上，心地善良，持之以恒，拯救苍生的精神塑造得很成功。同时在情感方面也塑造了一个：不主动滥情，全是被动接受，主动只深爱一人，比较符合大多数男人心理期待。
不足：部分章节经常出现人物名字混淆，数据错误等影响不大的错误，但是也会影响看书体验，希望作者能更细心一些，认真码字，加油！同时希望对战斗或修炼之类的情节不要太过于夸张，能带给读者一种真实感，玄幻的同时也能贴近现实，或许会更能感染读者。谢谢作者，希望你继续努力！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1699091676,"group_id":"7143134984532921382","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"奇幻世界，极乐世界…","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/jAc48KHuv4R9A/aLx2a3NlFtwIPI9xgqIBA300Aelf","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529650&x-signature=hnlAaND2JahZJ5YIbXdCK72Bw34%3D","user_id":"2762424395244692","user_name":"奇幻小说迷"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2762424395244692","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7143134984532921382","book_info":{"abstract":"【无敌、热血、快节奏、爆更、亿万读者强推！】十万年前，人人如龙，皆可修炼武道，劫变之后，天道崩塌，诸神陨落，只有一尊轮回古塔遗留世间。
